title: Pukka Pad, Wild A4+ Jotta Notebooks – Pack of 2 Wirebound Notebooks in Assorted Zebra and Leopard Prints – 160 Pages of 80GSM Lined Paper
features: Let Your Imagination Run Wild: Designed in chic animal prints that never go out of style, the Pukka Pad Wild Collection is a timeless addition to your home office; available in different animal prints, there’s something for every wild side
An Office Essential: You can never have too many notebooks; great for home, school, and work uses you can do anything from writing a novel to making a grocery list
Premium Paper: These notebooks feature 160 pages of high-quality 80GSM ruled paper to prevent ghosting and bleeding
Convenient Designs: Each sheet is micro-perforated and has 4 hole punched edges, so it’s easy to tear out and add to your A4 sized ring binders

Animal-Friendly: The Pukka Pad Wild Collection features faux Crocodile, Python, Tiger, and Zebra prints available in pens, pencil cases, project books, notepads, and more for an animal-friendly way to show your fierce spirit
description: Pukka Pad, a leading global manufacturer of professional and student stationery, notebooks, dividers, and file products, paper pads, packaging materials, and art and activity books, has expanded its collection of beautiful yet functional Wild Collection of office products, and school supplies New from the Pukka Wild Collection is the A4+ Jotta Notebooks. These notebooks come in packs of two, featuring zebra and leopard print designs. The inside covers have coordinating animal print designs as well, making them wild inside and out. Each notebook has 160 pages of 80GSM paper that prevents ghosting and bleeding onto the next page. They’re ruled and include margins for annotations and doodles alike. The pages are perforated and have 4-hole punches, making them easy to remove and add to your ring binder. They’re an absolute must-have for anyone with a wild side. Founded in the UK in 1999, Pukka Pad has designed beautiful and functional stationery for the office, school, and home to encourage you to be inspired, write, create, and get organised every day.
